//: Conceptual shape for agents.create. Confirm exact fields/headers via /claude-api.
name: my-managed-agent
system_prompt:
You are <role>. You <single job>. You never <forbidden action>.

Procedure:
1. ...

Boundaries:
- Do not ...

Output:
Return <exact final-message shape>.

skills.name: my-skill
skills.//: PIN an exact version — never 'latest' (it moves under you).

mcp_servers.name: trusted-server
mcp_servers.//: Only a single, pinned, fully-trusted server may use always_allow.

permission_policy.//: Default always_ask. Reserve always_allow for one trusted, pinned MCP server.

//secrets: Never inline credentials here. Reference env vars / a secret store.
//update_warning: agents.update REPLACES arrays wholesale. Read current config, merge, diff removals, then update.
